function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request because one of the five specified OCR targets is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_16__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md`. I located and reviewed the other four files, but I did not mutate anything because completing only 4/5 would be partial.
function.rulebook_notes: Per workflow and task-completion rules, do not silently complete partial work when a required referenced file is missing; stop and request clarification.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly lists five files to OCR, including an underscore-prefixed path. Direct read of that exact path returned file-not-found, and a follow-up find in `/50_finance/purchases` found no such file. Because a required input is absent, the task is incomplete from available evidence and requires clarification.
